description_long: This sconce features a circular, drum-like body suspended from a single central rod and canopy, designed for ceiling mounting. The main body is composed of a series of scalloped, translucent panels arranged in a ring, giving it a decorative, almost floral appearance. The top of the fixture is open, revealing a metal framework that supports the panels and likely houses the internal light source. The central rod is metallic and slender, with a slight curve in the cable, adding a touch of elegance. The overall look is both modern and subtly ornate, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces. The materials appear to be a combination of frosted glass or acrylic for the panels and metal for the structural elements.
description: A circular, scalloped sconce with frosted panels and a metallic frame, suspended from a central rod for ceiling mounting. The design is modern with decorative, floral-like elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, scalloped edge of the sconce and the central rod extending upward.
description_view_1: This view highlights the slight curve in the suspension cable and the open top structure of the fixture.
description_view_2: The sconce's circular form and the arrangement of the scalloped panels are clearly visible from this angle.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the metallic framework and the decorative edge, with the rod and cable visible above.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern design with subtle decorative scalloped edges, blending contemporary style with a hint of floral motif. Its clean lines and frosted panels make it suitable for both residential and commercial urban spaces.
